summary: Iter 163 — Utilities → PDF Report Formats (SUPER ADMIN ONLY). Backend 12/12 pytest cases pass (list/get/put/delete/validation + PDF content assertions via pdfminer). Frontend UI verified end-to-end on mobile viewport (375x812): login as super admin, navigate to /report-formats, header + SUPER ADMIN ONLY badge, 5 cards render (rf-register, rf-pf_ecr, rf-pf_challan, rf-esic_contribution, rf-esic_challan), PF ECR generic editor shows 12 column rows + title/orientation/font, save writes 'Custom format saved' on the card, reopen persists (title 'UI TEST TITLE', renamed UAN heading 'UAN Number'), Reset to Default restores to 'Using default format' on all 4 cards. PF Challan editor shows no column rows and the fixed-statutory note (title/orientation/font only) and save works. Compliance Salary Register (rf-register) opens its dedicated RegisterLayoutEditor with S.No/Code/Emp Name rows. All saved formats deleted at the end of testing (autouse cleanup fixture).
critical_code_review_comments: Cosmetic console warnings on web (not blockers): 'shadow*' deprecated → boxShadow; a few style props ('outline', 'background', 'padding: 0 8px') aren't recognised by RNW. Pre-existing across the app, not specific to this iteration.
seed_data_creation: None. Autouse fixture DELETEs any saved report_format:* keys both before and after the run, leaving formats at defaults as requested.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend endpoints under /api/admin/report-formats and PDF assertions use pdfminer (already installed). Company cmp_527fecdd7c has a compliance run for 2026-07 needed for ecr.pdf / esic-challan.pdf content checks. Super admin token = session_token from /api/auth/admin-password-login. Frontend page is /report-formats, gated to super_admin only (redirects to /).
